data.name: label4.Text
data.value: Select the file containing the species names to be used by pressing the 'List' button. Then choose the column to filter on and set the action using the options below. Finally, press Compare to flag any matching species.

data.name: label19.Text
data.value: To filter and combine species read count data, press Select to import the read count file, then choose the range of sample data columns before processing. Finally, press Save to write the results to a file.
